inclusion: Proposes or evaluates sparse autoencoders (SAEs) or dictionary learning for neural network analysis
Studies mechanistic interpretability, feature extraction, or circuit analysis in language models or neural networks
Empirically analyzes internal representations or activations of transformer models
Introduces evaluation methods or benchmarks for interpretability techniques
exclusion: Does not involve neural network interpretability or internal representation analysis
Applies LLMs only as a tool for unrelated tasks (e.g., translation, summarization, code generation) without studying internals
Pure survey or meta-analysis with no new methods or empirical results
Focuses exclusively on hardware efficiency, training speed, or deployment without interpretability goals
